# Vayuron Advanced Systems

> Autonomous UAV systems, AI platforms, and advanced defence/aerospace
> engineering for national security, government infrastructure, energy,
> agriculture, and industrial sectors.

Vayuron Advanced Systems designs and manufactures unmanned aerial vehicles,
edge-deployed artificial intelligence for real-time operational intelligence,
and precision engineering/systems integration services, serving defence,
government, energy, agriculture, and mining/surveying customers.

## Products

- [UAV Systems](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/products/uav-systems): Autonomous fixed-wing, rotary, and hybrid VTOL drones built on indigenous technology.
- [MVTX](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/products/mvtx): Multi-view video transmission system for real-time, secure multi-feed UAV video access.
- [Artificial Intelligence](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/products/artificial-intelligence): Edge-deployed AI for real-time object detection, sensor fusion, and autonomous decision-making.
- [Advanced Engineering](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/products/advanced-engineering): Precision fabrication, structural design, and indigenous avionics development.

## Sectors

- [Defence & Homeland Security](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/sectors/defence-homeland-security)
- [Government & Smart Infrastructure](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/sectors/government-smart-infrastructure)
- [Energy, Industrial & Critical Infrastructure](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/sectors/energy-industrial-critical-infrastructure)
- [Agriculture & Environmental Intelligence](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/sectors/agriculture-environmental-intelligence)
- [Mining, Surveying & Research](https://vayuronadvancedsystems.com/sectors/mining-surveying-research)
